block_01: Moving Averages provide traders with an unlimited amount of variations in which they can combine them. The Ribbon strategy utilizes several moving averages, plotting them around the chart to help determine the strength and direction of the trend. Traders can customize the amount of MAs, as well as their type and period.
block_02: In this article, we cover the Ribbon method which calls for 10 simple moving averages: 5 long-term and 5 short-term ones, which together can give signals for buying and selling. Learn how to read their crossings to become the Moving Average master!
block_03: Check the full article for examples of usage and important tips.
